# cmrdesign

`cmrdesign` implements Conditional Minimax Regret (CMR) design rules for
pilot-informed experiments in R. Pass pilot outcomes and assignment
labels, get a recommended main-wave allocation and a worst-case regret
certificate.

The methods accompany [When and How to Pilot: Design Rules for Two-Wave
Experiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16982) by [Juan C.
Yamin](https://juancyamin.github.io/).

## Installation

Install the R package from R-universe:

``` r

install.packages(
  "cmrdesign",
  repos = c("https://juancyamin.r-universe.dev", "https://cloud.r-project.org")
)
```

Or install the development version from GitHub:

``` r

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("juancyamin/cmrdesign", subdir = "r")
```

## Quick Start

In a two-arm design, `y` is one vector of pilot outcomes and `d` marks
the arm for each observation. Here the first 40 observations are
treatment and the next 40 are control.

``` r

library(cmrdesign)

set.seed(123)
d <- c(rep(1, 40), rep(0, 40))
y <- c(rbeta(40, 2, 5), rbeta(40, 4, 4))

fit <- cmr_two_arm(y, d, alpha = 0.05, method = "auto")
fit$pi
fit$U_CMR
summary(fit)
```

`pi` is the recommended treatment share for the main wave. `U_CMR` is
the worst-case regret certificate over the confidence set for arm
variances.

## Which Function Should I Use?

| If your design is… | Use… |
|----|----|
| One treatment and one control | [`cmr_two_arm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_two_arm.md) |
| Two arms with raw unbounded outcomes | [`cmr_unbounded()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_unbounded.md) |
| Several treatments sharing one control | [`cmr_multiarm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiarm.md) |
| Known strata with possibly different variances | [`cmr_stratified()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_stratified.md) |
| Multiple outcomes per unit | [`cmr_multiple_outcomes()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiple_outcomes.md) |
| Proxy or delayed primary outcome | [`cmr_proxy()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_proxy.md) |
| Pilot versus main-wave sample-size planning | [`cmr_plan()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/pilot_plan.md) |

The direct rectangle functions, such as
[`cmr_two_arm_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
and
[`cmr_multiarm_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiarm_from_rectangle.md),
are useful for auditing or teaching. Applied users will usually pass
pilot data directly and let the package estimate the confidence
rectangle.

## Choosing a Confidence Method

| Method | Use when… |
|----|----|
| `method = "auto"` | Use the default applied behavior. It chooses exact Bernoulli bounds for raw 0/1 outcomes and bounded-outcome bounds otherwise. |
| `method = "bounded"` or `"mp"` | Outcomes are bounded, usually normalized to `[0, 1]`. |
| `method = "bernoulli"` | Outcomes are truly binary and coded 0/1. |
| `method = "mtr"` | You specifically want Martinez-Taboada–Ramdas bounds. The rule uses pilot row order, so do not sort outcomes before calling it. |
| `method = "unbounded"` | Two-arm outcomes are raw finite values rather than bounded-scale values. Use [`cmr_unbounded()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_unbounded.md) and supply a kurtosis bound `psi`. |

CMR is a design rule for allocating the next experimental wave. It is
not a treatment-effect estimator, and `U_CMR` is not a treatment-effect
confidence interval.

## Python Package

The companion Python package is available on
[PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/cmrdesign/).

## Feedback

`cmrdesign` is an early release. Please report issues with simulated,
public, or redacted data:

- [Bug
  reports](https://github.com/juancyamin/cmrdesign/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- [Usage
  questions](https://github.com/juancyamin/cmrdesign/issues/new?template=usage_question.yml)
- [Alpha
  feedback](https://github.com/juancyamin/cmrdesign/issues/new?template=alpha_feedback.yml)

# Package index

## Applied CMR rules

User-facing rules that estimate a confidence set from pilot data and
return a recommended main-wave allocation plus a regret certificate.

- [`binary_rectangle_corners()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`binary_rectangle_regret()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`cmr_two_arm_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`cmr_binary_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  : Two-arm CMR from a variance rectangle
- [`cmr_multiarm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiarm.md)
  : Shared-control multi-arm CMR assignment
- [`cmr_multiarm_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiarm_from_rectangle.md)
  : Multi-arm CMR from a variance rectangle
- [`cmr_multiple_outcomes()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_multiple_outcomes.md)
  : Multiple-outcome CMR assignment
- [`cmr_proxy()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_proxy.md)
  [`cmr_delayed_outcome()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_proxy.md)
  : Proxy or delayed-outcome CMR assignment
- [`cmr_stratified()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_stratified.md)
  : Stratified CMR assignment
- [`cmr_stratified_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_stratified_from_rectangle.md)
  : Stratified CMR from a variance rectangle
- [`cmr_two_arm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`cmr_binary()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_two_arm.md)
  : Two-arm Conditional Minimax Regret assignment
- [`cmr_unbounded()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_unbounded.md)
  : Unbounded-outcome CMR assignment
- [`cmr_unbounded_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmr_unbounded_from_rectangle.md)
  : Unbounded-outcome CMR from a variance rectangle
- [`pilot_plan()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/pilot_plan.md)
  [`cmr_plan()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/pilot_plan.md)
  : Pilot/main-wave planning summary

## Pilot planning

Screens from Appendix E of the accompanying paper (Yamin 2026) for
planning the pilot/main-wave split before collecting pilot data.

- [`activation_threshold_bounded()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/activation_threshold_bounded.md)
  [`activation_threshold_bernoulli()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/activation_threshold_bounded.md)
  : Pilot-size activation thresholds
- [`pilot_viability_band()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/pilot_viability_band.md)
  : Pilot viability band
- [`break_even_pilot_share()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/break_even_pilot_share.md)
  : Break-even pilot share

## Confidence rectangles and variance bounds

Expert and audit helpers for the confidence sets used by CMR rules.

- [`rectangle_bernoulli_binary()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bernoulli_binary.md)
  [`rectangle_binary()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bernoulli_binary.md)
  [`rectangle_two_arm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bernoulli_binary.md)
  [`rectangle_bernoulli_two_arm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bernoulli_binary.md)
  : Two-arm confidence rectangles
- [`rectangle_bounded_two_arm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bounded_binary.md)
  [`rectangle_bounded_binary()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_bounded_binary.md)
  : Bounded two-arm confidence rectangle
- [`rectangle_multiarm()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_multiarm.md)
  : Multi-arm confidence rectangle
- [`rectangle_multiple_outcomes()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_multiple_outcomes.md)
  : Multiple-outcome confidence rectangle
- [`rectangle_proxy()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_proxy.md)
  [`rectangle_delayed_outcome()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_proxy.md)
  : Proxy or delayed-outcome confidence rectangle
- [`rectangle_stratified()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_stratified.md)
  : Stratified confidence rectangle
- [`rectangle_unbounded()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/rectangle_unbounded.md)
  : Unbounded-outcome confidence rectangle
- [`variance_bounds_bernoulli_exact()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_bounds_bernoulli_exact.md)
  : Exact Bernoulli variance bounds
- [`variance_bounds_maurer_pontil()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_bounds_maurer_pontil.md)
  [`variance_bounds_martinez_taboada_ramdas()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_bounds_maurer_pontil.md)
  : Bounded-outcome variance bounds
- [`variance_bounds_unbounded_mom()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_bounds_unbounded_mom.md)
  : Unbounded-outcome median-of-means variance bounds
- [`folded_binomial_pmf()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/folded_binomial_pmf.md)
  [`folded_binomial_tails()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/folded_binomial_pmf.md)
  : Folded-binomial distribution for Bernoulli sample variances
- [`binary_rectangle_corners()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`binary_rectangle_regret()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`cmr_two_arm_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  [`cmr_binary_from_rectangle()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/binary_rectangle_corners.md)
  : Two-arm CMR from a variance rectangle

## Assignment rules and variance objectives

Baseline allocation rules and regret/objective helpers for audits,
examples, and simulations.

- [`assign_balance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_multiarm_balance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_stratified_balance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_feasible_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_trimmed_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_additive_regularized_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  [`assign_exponential_regularized_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/assign_balance.md)
  : Baseline and comparator assignment rules
- [`multiarm_variance_objective()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/multiarm_variance_objective.md)
  [`multiarm_oracle_variance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/multiarm_variance_objective.md)
  [`assign_multiarm_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/multiarm_variance_objective.md)
  [`multiarm_regret()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/multiarm_variance_objective.md)
  [`multiarm_rectangle_vertices()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/multiarm_variance_objective.md)
  : Multi-arm variance objectives and Neyman allocation
- [`stratified_variance_objective()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/stratified_variance_objective.md)
  [`stratified_oracle_variance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/stratified_variance_objective.md)
  [`assign_stratified_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/stratified_variance_objective.md)
  [`stratified_regret()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/stratified_variance_objective.md)
  [`stratified_rectangle_vertices()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/stratified_variance_objective.md)
  : Stratified variance objectives and Neyman allocation
- [`variance_objective()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_objective.md)
  [`oracle_variance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_objective.md)
  [`assign_neyman()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_objective.md)
  [`regret()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/variance_objective.md)
  : Two-arm variance objectives and Neyman allocation

## Diagnostics

Small helpers for checking CMR certificates, coverage, boundary choices,
and realized gains.

- [`coverage_indicator()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  [`certificate_valid()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  [`boundary_indicator()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  [`boundary_rate()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  [`saving_vs_balance()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  [`share_of_oracle_gain()`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/coverage_indicator.md)
  : Diagnostic metrics for CMR simulations

## Result display

Print and summary methods for compact CMR result objects.

- [`print(`*`<cmr_two_arm>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<cmr_unbounded>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<cmr_proxy>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<cmr_multiple_outcomes>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<cmr_multiarm>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<cmr_stratified>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_two_arm>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_unbounded>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_proxy>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_multiple_outcomes>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_multiarm>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`summary(`*`<cmr_stratified>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  [`print(`*`<summary.cmr_result>`*`)`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/print.cmr_two_arm.md)
  : Print and summarize CMR results

## Package

- [`cmrdesign`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmrdesign-package.md)
  [`cmrdesign-package`](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/reference/cmrdesign-package.md)
  : cmrdesign: Conditional Minimax Regret design rules

  Outcomes](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/articles/proxy-outcomes.md):

  Planning](https://juancyamin.github.io/cmrdesign/articles/pilot-planning.md):
